transcript: Speaker A: English seekho ek rupaye mein! English seekho ek rupaye mein! [Learn English for one rupee! Learn English for one rupee!] Speaker B: Are bhaiya, jhoot kyun bol rahe ho? Koi bhi English coaching class 1500 rupaye per month se kam mein English nahi sikhati hai. [Hey brother, why are you lying? No English coaching class teaches English for less than 1500 rupees per month.] Speaker A: Isliye main Arya se English seekhne ki baat kar raha hoon. Ye normal coaching classes se saat guna sasti hai. Aur sirf ek rupaye mein shuru kar sakte ho. [That's why I'm talking about learning English from Arya. This is seven times cheaper than normal coaching classes. And you can start for just one rupee.] Speaker B: Par ye to AI hai. Kya ye acche se English sikha payegi? [But this is AI. Will it be able to teach English well?] Speaker C: Maine already pachas lakh se zyada logon ko English sikhayi hai, to tum bhi seekh lo. [I have already taught English to more than 50 lakh people, so you should learn too.] Speaker B: Par mere paas zyada time nahi hai. [But I don't have much time.] Speaker C: Roz mere saath bas das-pandra minute practice karo, aur kuch hi dino mein tumhari English farratedar ho jayegi. [Just practice with me for 10-15 minutes daily, and in a few days your English will become fluent.] Speaker B: Wow! To shuru kahan se karoon? [Wow! So where do I start?] Speaker C: Install button par click karo, MySivi app install karo, aur apni fifteen days English learning challenge shuru karo. [Click on the install button, install the MySivi app, and start your fifteen days English learning challenge.] Speaker D: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: ENGLISH; 1 RUPYE [1 Rupee]; 7X CHEAPER; MySivi Sale Ends Today; 3 days for ₹1; 5M+ Downloads; Sivi is now MySivi; 15 DAYS ENGLISH LEARNING CHALLENGE; Install Now
summary: A rickshaw puller and an AI robot passenger convince a young man to learn English using the MySivi app for just 1 Rupee. The robot highlights its user base of over 50 lakh people and promises fluency with just 10-15 minutes of daily practice. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app and start a 15-day challenge.
